mnemonics.title: Protocol Characteristics
mnemonics.content: I2C = I Connect 2 wires (multi-device bus). SPI = Speed Performance Interface (4 wires, full-duplex). UART = Universal Asynchronous Remote Talk (2 wires, no clock).

mnemonics.title: SPI Wire Names
mnemonics.content: MISO MOSI SCLK CE - Master In Slave Out, Master Out Slave In, Serial Clock, Chip Enable

mnemonics.title: Interface Speed Order
mnemonics.content: Slow to Fast: I2C (100kHz) < UART (variable) < SPI (MHz) < USB (Gbps) < Ethernet (Gbps)

mnemonics.title: GPIO Pin Safety
mnemonics.content: 3.3V LIMIT - Never exceed 3.3V on GPIO pins, 16mA max per pin, always use current-limiting resistors for LEDs
